zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Guy Fisher於大約1543年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾格亞特 格藍斯登。他於1560年1月25日與Jone Sutton在英國亨廷格多史爾格亞特 格藍斯登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1588年12月在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾格亞特 格藍斯登聖 巴洛梅也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Guy Fisher于大约1543年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾格亞特 格藍斯登。他于1560年1月25日与Jone Sutton在英国亨廷格多史爾格亞特 格藍斯登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1588年12月在他的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾格亞特 格藍斯登聖 巴洛梅也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Fisher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle English fis(sc)her(e) ‘fisherman’ (Old English fiscere). In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from many other languages, including German Fischer and its Slavic(ized) variant Fišer (see Fiser ), Dutch Visser , Hungarian Halász (see Halasz ), Italian Pescatore , Slovenian Ribič (see Ribic ), and Croatian Ribić or Ribar .

English: in a few cases, possibly a topographic name for someone who lived near a fish weir on a river, from Middle English fis(sc)hwere, fisshyar ‘fish weir’ (Old English fiscwer, fiscgear), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Fisher in North Mundham, Sussex.
Irish: translation into English of Gaelic Ó Bradáin ‘descendant of Bradán’, a personal name meaning ‘salmon’. See Braden .

variants.name: Fischer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Gerhard, Helmut, Fritz, Klaus, Horst, Dieter, Franz, Ernst.

German, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle High German visch, German Fisch ‘fish’ + the agent suffix -er. This form of the surname is also established in some other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, and the Netherlands. In Poland, Czechia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is (also) established in the Slavicized forms Fiszer (Polish) and Fišer (see Fiser ). Compare Fisher .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Guy Fisher was born about 1543, in Great Gransden, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Jone Sutton on 25 January 1560, in Great Gransden, Huntingdonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in December 1588, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in St Bartholomew's Church, Great Gransden, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Saint Bartholomew's Church, Great Gransd: St Bartholomew's Church, Great Gransden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Guy Fisher est né environ 1543, à Great Gransden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Jone Sutton le 25 janvier 1560, à Great Gransden, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en décembre 1588, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à St Bartholomew's Church, Great Gransden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Jone Sutton il 25 gennaio 1560, nel Great Gransden, Huntingdonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Guy Fisherは約1543年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアグレアト グランスデンで生まれた。1560年1月25日にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアグレアト グランスデンでJone Suttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1588年12月に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアグレアト グランスデンスト バーソロメウ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Bartholomew's Church, Great Gransd: 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 그리트 그랜즈든 스트 바토롬w'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Guy Fisher(은)는 대략 1543년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 그리트 그랜즈든에서 태어났다. 그는 1560년 1월 25일 영국 헌틴그도실르 그리트 그랜즈든에서 Jone Sutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1588년 12월 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 그리트 그랜즈든 스트 바토롬w'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Guy Fisher nasceu aproximadamente 1543, em Great Gransden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Jone Sutton em 25 de janeiro de 1560, em Great Gransden, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1588, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em St Bartholomew's Church, Great Gransden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Bartholomew's Church, Great Gransd: ст бартоломю'с чурч, грит грансден, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Guy Fisher родился около 1543 г. в местности грит грансден, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Jone Sutton 25 января 1560 г. в местности грит грансден, хантингдоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер декабрь 1588 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности ст бартоломю'с чурч, грит грансден, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Guy Fisher nació aproximadamente 1543, en Great Gransden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Jone Sutton el 25 de enero de 1560, en Great Gransden, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1588, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en St Bartholomew's Church, Great Gransden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
